title: Manufacturing Engineer - Kia India Holdings Services - Work From Home Available

jsonLd.title: Manufacturing Engineer - Kia India Holdings Services - Work From Home Available
jsonLd.description:
If you're a passionate Manufacturing Engineer with drive and ambition, Kia India Holdings Services in Jaipur is the place for you. We're growing fast and need talented people to grow with us.

About Kia India Holdings Services:
Kia India Holdings Services is a leading organization in the Hybrid sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Train and supervise shop floor workers and supervisors
• Coordinate with design and engineering teams on product improvements
• Oversee daily production operations to meet output targets
• Manage supplier quality audits and vendor development
• Ensure product quality meets internal and customer specifications
• Ensure compliance with safety regulations and factory acts
• Implement lean manufacturing and continuous improvement initiatives

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• CA / CMA / CFA certification
• 6-10 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in SAP MM/PP
• Proficiency in SolidWorks
• Proficiency in APQP
• Proficiency in Root Cause Analysis
• Proficiency in Project Management
• Proficiency in FMEA
• Proficiency in Statistical Process Control
• Proficiency in TPM

Work Mode: Hybrid - Flexible work-from-home and office

What We Offer:
• International travel opportunities for senior roles
• Provident Fund and Gratuity as per company policy
• Annual paid leaves and casual leaves
• Company-sponsored certifications
• Annual performance appraisal
• Flexible working hours
• Salary Range: 12 LPA - 25 LPA per annum

Location: Jaipur, Rajasthan, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Kia India Holdings Services!
